name: Dynamics 365 Contact Center
description: Agent desktop and live-call context: member identity, reason for contact, routing, and interaction history. The surface Agent-Assist augments in real time during the call.

name: Radiant Agent-Assist
description: The copilot layer that reads across systems on the live call, pre-diagnoses the issue, drafts compliant resolutions, and keeps an AI-vs-human action log so quality and compliance are protected.

name: Core Banking
description: Real-time balances, account flags, and posted history. Supplies the balance-at-draw and account-state facts behind the root-cause explanation.

name: Payments Engine
description: Declined payments, early salary credits, hold states, and retry queues. Powers the decline diagnosis and the automated payment retry after the routing fix.

name: SOP/MOP Knowledge Base
description: Standard and method procedures for deposits and account changes, plus plain-language script guidance. Grounds both the explanation and the compliant resolution sequence.

name: CRM / Member Records
description: Member profile, product holdings, prior contacts, and the disposition note. Links this call to Elena's broader relationship and captures the compliance-linked after-call record.
